characters.name: AA Meeting Group Leader
characters.description: AA Meeting Group LeaderSpeciesHumanSexFemaleOccupationAA Meeting Group LeaderBehind the scenesFirst appearanceThe Face of DepressionLast appearanceThe Horny UnicornThe unnamedAA Meeting Group Leaderis a minor, recurring character inBoJack Horseman. She is the leader ofBoJack'sAA meetings. She is first seen inThe Face of Depression, inSeason 6. The Group Leaderis a human woman with short brown hair with bangs going across her forehead and a shaved undercut. She wears heavy purple eyeshadow and burgundy lipstick. The Group Leaderappears to be a kind, friendly woman. AfterBoJack'ssecond interview withBiscuits BraxbyinXerox of a Xerox, however, she dislikes him and she and the rest of the group members treat BoJack with hostility and glares. Little else is known about her.

characters.name: Abe D'Catfish
characters.description: Abe D'CatfishSpeciesCatfishSexMaleOccupationFilm DirectorFamilyShirley D'Catfish(wife)Behind the scenesVoiced byGarry MarshallFirst appearanceThe ShotLast appearanceFish Out of WaterAbe D'Catfishis a recurring character. His first appearance was inThe Shot, inSeason 2. Abe is a friendly, jovial, supposedly easy to work with director who doesn't mind being the studios "yes man" and doesn't care about making movies for the awards. That is, until BoJack jokingly points out how bad and cheesy the movie is turning out, and hurts Abe's feelings and hard work on the production. This does cause him to be a little bit more sadistic with BoJack on set. Abeis an overweight dark brown male catfish with a grey patch on his chin. He has grey barbels that point down vaguely representing a mustache. Abe is a friendly, jovial, supposedly easy to work with director who doesn't mind being the studios "yes man" and doesn't care about making movies for the awards. That is, until BoJack jokingly points out how bad and cheesy the movie is turning out, and hurts Abe's feelings and hard work on the production. This does cause him to be a little bit more sadistic with BoJack on set.

characters.name: Vincent Adultman
characters.description: Vincent AdultmanAge"Adult"AliasesKevinThree Kids stacked up on each other.SpeciesHumanSexMaleResidenceLos AngelesOccupation"Business Manager" at the "Business Factory"FamilyKevin("son"/ face of Adultman)Two unnamed, alleged bottom children (torso, legs of Adultman)Unnamed "ex-wife"Princess Carolyn(ex-girlfriend)Behind the scenesVoiced byAlison BrieFirst appearanceHorse MajeureLast appearanceHigher LoveVincent Adultmanis a recurring character throughoutSeason 1-Season 2ofBoJack Horseman. He is first introduced inHorse Majeure, inSeason 1. Vincent Adultmanis an alleged human "adult male," whose face resembles a young boy namedKevin. He has blonde hair, blue eyes, freckles, and braces. He wears a long brown, double-breasted, button-down trench coat, a black undershirt, a grey fedora with a red band, blue jeans, white socks, and blue sneakers with Velcro straps. His right hand is a broom and his left hand is a mannequin hand.

characters.name: Alan the Cable Guy
characters.description: Alan the Cable GuyAliasesAlan the Cable GuySpeciesPandaSexMaleOccupationNetwork Cable Technician of Shoots and Leaves Cable ServiceFamilyUnnamed wifeUnknown newborn childBehind the scenesOnly appearanceThe Shot  He is a cable guy, who, after he went toBoJack'shouse to fix his TV, started to help him in his plan to get to break intoThe Nixon libraryso BoJack could get to film part of his movie, although he was partially forced into the situation. Alanis generally a caring individual, who is willing to help others even if they don't do anything for him in return, and grew to become friendly towards BoJack's friends, namely Todd. Alan was also proven to be selfless, as he took a bullet from a police officer to save Margo Martindale. He's also presumably a loving husband, as he left to see his wife after finding out she was going into labor. Little else is known about his personal life.

characters.name: Amanda Hannity
characters.description: Amanda HannitySpeciesManateeSexFemaleOccupationEditor-in-Chief atManatee FairBehind the scenesVoiced byChristine BaranskiFirst appearanceHank After DarkLast appearanceThe New ClientNice While It Lasted(Cameo) Nice While It Lasted(Cameo) Diane and BoJack atManatee Fair Amanda Hannityis the somewhat aggressive Editor-in-Chief atManatee Fair. She at first seems to care about the right actions only to back out at the last minute and care about what makes a profit and what will keep her business going. This shown inHank After Dark,whenAmanda says she's cutting the story, as the owners ofManatee Fair, and she herself also believes it's not an appropriate time to leak the story. AlthoughDianedoes point outthe same peoplewho ownManatee Fairalso own MBN, the channelHankis on. Little else is known about her.

He appears inThe Dog Days Are Over, inSeason 5. TheTouristis a slightly overweight human man with spiky red hair, a beard, mustache, with a goatee on his chin. He also has bags under his eyes and slight wrinkles. He wears a green visor on his head. The American Touristappears to be a nervous and confused man, little else is known about him.

characters.name: Ana Spanakopita
characters.description: —Ana toBoJack,That's Too Much, Man!  Ana SpanakopitaAliasesThe Oscar Whisperer (Lenny Turteltaub)Moussaka (Princess Carolyn)Little Falafel Pocket (Princess Carolyn)SpeciesHumanSexFemaleOccupationPublicistFamilyUnnamed sonUnnamed ex-husbandBehind the scenesVoiced byAngela BassettFirst appearanceOut to SeaLast appearanceBoJack the Feminist Anais a ruthless publicist, willing to forego most things, to win her clientsOscars. For example, when BoJack accidentally leaked the truth aboutSecretariattoHeather(a reporter fromManatee Fair), Ana dealt with the situation—stopping Heather from publishing a story. InIt's You,she is seen coming off the phone from speaking to Heather about whatBoJack Horsemanwas doing during theOscarannouncements. Ana is very forward, bold, and blunt. This is shown when, after dropping all her clients besides BoJack, she gives him a handjob. She then tightly squeezes his penis, causing him to cry out in pain—before warning him never to betray her again. She is ironically aroused by BoJack being in charge, implying she is some sort of masochist.

This is shown when, after dropping all her clients besides BoJack, she gives him a handjob. She then tightly squeezes his penis, causing him to cry out in pain—before warning him never to betray her again. She is ironically aroused by BoJack being in charge, implying she is some sort of masochist.

characters.name: Ana Spanakopita
characters.description: —Ana toBoJack,That's Too Much, Man!  Ana SpanakopitaAliasesThe Oscar Whisperer (Lenny Turteltaub)Moussaka (Princess Carolyn)Little Falafel Pocket (Princess Carolyn)SpeciesHumanSexFemaleOccupationPublicistFamilyUnnamed sonUnnamed ex-husbandBehind the scenesVoiced byAngela BassettFirst appearanceOut to SeaLast appearanceBoJack the Feminist Anais a ruthless publicist, willing to forego most things, to win her clientsOscars. For example, when BoJack accidentally leaked the truth aboutSecretariattoHeather(a reporter fromManatee Fair), Ana dealt with the situation—stopping Heather from publishing a story. InIt's You,she is seen coming off the phone from speaking to Heather about whatBoJack Horsemanwas doing during theOscarannouncements. Ana is very forward, bold, and blunt. This is shown when, after dropping all her clients besides BoJack, she gives him a handjob. She then tightly squeezes his penis, causing him to cry out in pain—before warning him never to betray her again. She is ironically aroused by BoJack being in charge, implying she is some sort of masochist.

TompkinsFirst appearancePrickly-MuffinLast appearanceLaterNice While It Lasted(pictured)Sarah Lynncomforting Andrew in the hospital.Andrew Russel Garfieldis an American-British actor best known for playing the part of Spider-Man inThe Amazing Spider-Manseries. He is the ex-boyfriend ofSarah Lynn. He first appears inPrickly-Muffin, inSeason 1. Nice While It Lasted(pictured) AndrewGarfieldis a young adult human male, with dark mullet-style brown hair that poofs up at the top of his head. He has a big nose and a long neck. He also appears to be quite tall.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: AngelaAliasesAngela (birth name)Jelly (nickname)SpeciesHumanSexFemaleOccupationFilm Crew WorkerFamilyUnnamed FamilyAngelais a camera crew member, who is seen on many film-making projects, in theBoJackuniverse. Angela chatting with someone on the set ofPhilbert. Angela behind the camera Angelais a professional film crew worker. She appears to be kind, cheerful, and friendly by nature. Not much else is known about her personal life.

characters.name: Angela Diaz
characters.description: —Angela DiaztoBoJack Horseman,Angela  Angela DiazCurrent1990sSpeciesHumanSexFemaleOccupationNetwork executive for ABCBehind the scenesVoiced byAnjelica HustonFirst appearanceThe TelescopeLast appearanceAngelaThe View from Halfway Down(Mentioned)Angela Diazis a recurring character inBoJack Horseman.Her appearances were originally through flashbacks starting withThe Telescope, inSeason 1. She is shown for the first time in the present-day in the episodeAngela, inSeason 6. Angelatended to prioritize professionalism and efficiently doing her job, while coldly not giving thought to the individuals’ hurt in the process. She even said herself that making decisions that could ruin people's careers and lives are something she did on a daily basis. The episodeAngelareveals that her cold nature is what helped her survive as one of the few women in her career.

characters.name: Angelica Buenaventura
characters.description: Angelica BuenaventuraSpeciesAxolotlSexFemaleOccupationAdult Film StarFamilyMr. Buenaventura(husband)Yolanda Buenaventura(daughter)Mindy Buenaventura(daughter)Behind the scenesVoiced byEva Longoria Angelica Buenaventurais a one-time character inBoJack Horseman.She is the wife ofMr. Buenaventuraand the mother ofYolandaandMindy. Angelica is introduced along with the rest of Yolanda's family inPlanned ObsolescenceinSeason 5. Angelicais an adult female axolotl. She has bags under her eyes and a very voluptuous figure. She has pink skin, magenta lips, blue eyes, magenta freckles on her nose and cheeks, and her external gills are blonde and hang down. Angelicais an adult film star who finds asexuality fascinating and is sex-crazed likeher husbandand daughterMindy. She appears to be the more suggestive and flirtatious parent, while still being loving towards her husband. Considering they are both sex-addicts, its possible they might have an open marriage. When Yolanda admits she is asexual, the family had a thoughtful conversation about it (off screen) showing that they love her and support her.  Angelica being intrigued by the concept of asexuality was likely  foreshadowing the families acceptance. Yolanda brings up that it went very well because they are still her family and they all love her just how she is.

characters.name: Armadillo Lady
characters.description: Armadillo LadyNormalRolled UpSpeciesArmadilloSexFemaleBehind the scenesFirst appearanceSay AnythingLast appearanceThe TelescopeThe Armadillo Ladyis a minor and recurring character inBoJack Horseman. She first appearsThe Telescope, inSeason 1. The Armadillo Ladyis an old armadillo woman with spectacles perched on her nose. According to the model sheets, she is roughly about 5ft. tall. Rolled up, she becomes slightly above 2 1/2ft tall, shrinking roughlyt 3ft.

characters.name: Artie Nguyen
characters.description: Artie NguyenSpeciesHumanSexMaleResidenceBostonFamilyPa Nguyen(father; deceased)Ma Nguyen(mother)Tommy Nguyen(brother)Marty Nguyen(brother)Diane Nguyen(younger sister)Gary Nguyen(adoptive brother)Mr. Peanutbutter(ex brother-in-law)Guy(brother-in-law)Sonny(Step-nephew)Behind the scenesFirst appearanceLive Fast, Diane NguyenLast appearanceGood Damage(mentioned, illustrations) Diane's brothers inLive Fast, Diane Nguyen Arthur "Artie" Nguyenis a minor character inBoJack Horseman. He is one ofDiane Nguyen'sbrothers. His first and most prominent role was inLive Fast, Diane Nguyen, inSeason 1. ArtieNguyenis excited to meetBoJack, due to his love of Hollywoo celebrities, such as movie and television stars; and tries to get close to him as much as possible. He insists the family is American because they have assimilated into American culture, despite being Vietnamese. (because obviously, as everybody knows, you're not a true red-blooded god fearing American unless you were born in America, as made evident by the moron who made the previous edit) He is also known to be quite fond of many things commonly found in Vietnamese culture, such as dysfunctional, abusive families, as well as alcohol abuse, despite convincing himself this is part of being American. The fact they have to be reminded they were not born in America is quite telling. He even insists that the family can not find a good source of income "because all good jobs are going to the immigrants"—obvious hypocrisy coming from a family of Vietnamese immigrants.

characters.name: Arturo "Ice Man" Fonzerelli
characters.description: Arturo "Ice Man" FonzerelliAliasesIce Man, Papa FonzarelliSexMaleResidenceWichita, KansasOccupationFatherFamilyHollyhock(Adoptive Daughter)Dashawn Manheim(Romantic Partner)Steve Mannheim(Romantic Partner)Jose Guerrero(Romantic Partner)Cupe Robinson III(Romantic Partner)Otto Zilberschlag(Romantic Partner)Gregory Hsung(Romantic Partner)Quackers McQuack(Romantic Partner)Behind the scenesFirst appearanceLovin that cali lifestyle!!Last appearanceWhat Time Is It Right NowArturo "Ice Man" Fonzerelliis a recurring character inBoJack Horseman. He one ofHollyhock'seight adoptive fathers. He was first introduced inLovin that cali lifestyle!!, inSeason 4. Arturois a middle-aged man with slight wrinkles on his face, spiky grey hair, and thick black eyebrows. According to the model sheets, he is slightly more than 5 1/2 ft tall. Arturois based onHenry Winkler'sbeloved and iconic character Arthur "The Fonz/Fonzie" Fonzerelli. He is the coolest and most calm out of all the dads, which is why his nickname is "The Ice Man." Arturo, like the other dads, is very protective of Hollyhock and is a loving father. He's often seen with the other dads in arguments about Hollyhock's safety. He does not likeBoJack, and has good reason to feel that way.
